catalog_name.description: The name of the catalog where the schema and the volume are

schema_name.description: The name of the schema where the volume is

comment.description: The comment attached to the volume

owner.description: The identifier of the user who owns the volume

created_at.description: Time at which this volume was created, in epoch milliseconds.

created_by.description: TThe identifier of the user who created the volume

updated_at.description: Time at which this volume was last modified, in epoch milliseconds.

updated_by.description: The identifier of the user who updated the volume last time

storage_location.description: The storage location of the volume

full_name.description: Full name of volume, in form of __catalog_name__.__schema_name__.__volume_name__.
